creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

I've tested git version of obconf and it seems to work fine on my amd64
box, so you might want to check it out.

I'm not sure when I will be able to backport the fix and I'm not even
sure if I want to do it since it looks like there were some
infrastructure changes in git -- in this case it would be reasonable to
wait for the new release.

Roman Bogorodskiy
